reasoning: The FRED trend analysis indicates a 0.35 probability of the TGA balance being higher than its early November value (942,700 million). Historical data suggests the balance peaked recently and often recedes towards target levels (historically around ~800-850 billion) towards the end of the year. Due to mean reversion from this unusually high level, the likelihood of an increase is below 50%. Following the instruction that uncertainty should increase with the forecast horizon and probabilities for distant dates should converge towards 0.5, the probabilities step up for December and February.
